sql_array: CREATE TABLE h3_cells (index UInt64, area Float64);
UPDATE h3_cells SET area = h3CellAreaM2(579205133326352384) WHERE index = 579205133326352383;
SELECT index, area FROM h3_cells WHERE area > 50000.0;
SELECT index, h3CellAreaM2(index) AS computed_area FROM h3_cells WHERE index IN (579205133326352383, 579205133326352384);
